---
title: Individual Assignment 4 (15%)
---

Coming soon. 🚒

<!-- **Files for download**: -->


<!-- * Download the template -->

<!-- ::: {.callout appearance="minimal"} -->
<!-- <i class="bi bi-download"></i> [IA4_template.qmd](../assignment_data/IA4_template.qmd){download="IA4_template.qmd"} -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ::: {.callout appearance="minimal"} -->
<!-- <i class="bi bi-download"></i> [IA4 suggested solutions.html](Assignment4Solutions.html){download="Assignment4Solutions.html"} -->
<!-- ::: -->




<!-- You are to submit both an `IA4_NameSurname.qmd` file and a compiled `IA4_NameSurname.pdf` file for your assignment. -->



<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- #| output: asis -->
<!-- source(here::here("course_info.R")) -->
<!-- submit(schedule, "IA4") -->
<!-- ``` -->
